violations.text: Inspector observed a package of meat with some oxidization discoloration. PIC informed to remove meat from retail sales. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the meat display units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
(Food cart ) located in the (meat dept ) area was not in good repair.Observed broken on top of cart shelf New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary and chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sinks throughout establishment). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (meat display cooler in meat department ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The condensate from the (water line ) refrigeration unit(warehouse) is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain.Per PIC, plumber expected to repair today. Invoice submitted to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

(Various food product), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (various food product) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep and food was taken hot from steam table and placed in refrigerator.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The presence of (birds) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quat and chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink in the meat dept ). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The condensate from the (water drain ) refrigeration unit(warehouse) is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
A bucket were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
Various food product was observed with bird droppings. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product.See disposal(attachment) New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

(Stewed goat), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC voluntarily Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

(ROP Fish) was observed thawing on the counter with package intact. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing.PIC took fish out of package. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The presence of (rodents and birds ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quat and chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sinks in meat department ). New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of debris and bird droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Leakage observed at plumbing under 3 bay sink in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The sink used for food preparation and ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The water drain from refrigeration unit(warehouse) is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The floors throughout the warehouse have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The floors(retail)walls(warehouse and front counter)is in poor repair. Observed damage tiles and holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
Pot and utensils was observed in the handwashing sink.PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked food and produce) in the 2 Dr refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

(Various meats) was observed held at (51-55) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The cutting boards in the (kitchen ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
(Meat open case ) located in the (retail ) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed 54DF.Technician arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (2 dr reach in refrigerator ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
